results.title: Malt Whiskey
results.description: Woodford Reserve is a Kentucky Straight Malt Whiskey crafted from 51% malt and aged in new charred oak barrels, making it the malt whiskey for bourbon drinkers.

results.title: Woodford Reserve Kentucky Straight Malt Whiskey
results.description: This is an American Straight Malt Whiskey. So, that should tell you that the mash bill is 51% malted barley. The rest is 47% corn and only 2% rye.
